slides.headline: Ramadan starts in 30 days
slides.body: The biggest app opportunity you're ignoring
slides.visual_note: Crescent moon, countdown timer showing 30 days

slides.headline: The market
slides.body: 1.9 billion Muslims worldwide. Ramadan app downloads spike 300%+ in the month before. Every year.

slides.headline: What people search for
slides.body: Prayer times. Quran reading tracker. Fasting timer. Iftar recipes. Charity tracker. Daily duas.

slides.headline: Top Ramadan apps (and their revenue)
slides.body: Muslim Pro: $5M+/month. Quran Majeed: $500k/month. Athan: $300k/month. All subscription models.

slides.headline: Gaps in the market
slides.body: Focus/productivity for worship. Community fasting challenges. Kids Ramadan education. Ramadan meal prep. Charity impact tracking.
slides.visual_note: Gap analysis visual with empty quadrants

slides.headline: MVP you can build in 2 weeks
slides.body: Fasting streak tracker. Push notifications for suhoor/iftar. Daily Quran verse. Simple, focused, works offline.

slides.headline: Monetization that works
slides.body: Freemium with premium features. $29-49/year subscription. In-app donations to charity (take small cut). No ads during prayer times.

slides.headline: Marketing timing
slides.body: ASO optimization: NOW. Content marketing: 4 weeks before. Influencer outreach: 3 weeks before. Launch: 2 weeks before Ramadan.

slides.headline: Why this is a goldmine
slides.body: Recurring annual event. Highly engaged audience. Willing to pay for religious apps. Low competition compared to general productivity.

cta_slide.headline: I'm building a Ramadan focus app
